tool_args.label: 2018 Cropsey Avenue project - median, pedestrian islands, bus boarding island
tool_args.raw_text: 2018 Cropsey Avenue project from Bay Parkway to 26th Avenue: Widened median double-yellow lines, and new parking and travel lane lines. Painted and concrete pedestrian islands on median with flexible delineators. Bus boarding island for B6 and B82-SBS layover in front of I.S. 281. Curb regulation and signage changes.

payload.location_text: Cropsey Avenue from Bay Parkway to 26th Avenue
payload.description: Widened median double-yellow lines, new parking and travel lane lines, painted and concrete pedestrian islands on median with flexible delineators, bus boarding island for B6 and B82-SBS layover in front of I.S. 281, curb regulation and signage changes
